Case File 02 — The Work

Real cuts. Real chair.

Case File 03 — On The Menu

What's on offer.

Built from what's visible in the work above — confirm the full list and pricing directly with John.

Skin Fades & Tapers

Clean, sharp blends from skin-low to a natural taper.

Line-Ups & Edge-Ups

Crisp hairlines and shape-ups between full cuts.

Textured Crops

Curl and wave patterns kept intact, shaped rather than stripped.

Locs & Fade Combos

Fades paired with loc'd or twisted top styles.

Beard Sculpting

Shape-ups and line work to match the cut.

Prices aren't listed here on purpose — message on WhatsApp and John will confirm the current rate for your cut.
Case File 04 — Behind The Chair

One barber. One chair. No shortcuts.

Money Heist Barber is built around John and the work he posts — the fades, the tapers, the before-and-afters that built an audience on Instagram and TikTok before this shop ever had a website. The name is a nod to the show; the standard is his own.

Based in Kilimani, a short walk from Yaya Centre.
